seoTitle: Lee County School Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: Lee County School District 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 11 first day, May 27 last day, holidays, breaks, severe weather make-up days, PDF and ICS.
calendarNotes: The School District of Lee County starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 11, 2026 and lists May 27, 2027 as the students' last day with early dismissal. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 22-25. The calendar lists June 1-4, 2027 as reserved severe weather make-up windows that are only used if required.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Lee County school start in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first student day for The School District of Lee County is Tuesday, August 11, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Lee County in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last student day is Thursday, May 27, 2027, with early dismissal listed on the official instructional calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Which Lee County 2026-2027 dates are severe weather make-up days?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar lists June 1-4, 2027 as severe weather make-up days. Families should treat those dates as possible school days until Lee Schools confirms whether they are needed.

calendarFaqs.q: Can I add the Lee County school calendar to Google Calendar?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. MySchoolDates provides a one-time .ics calendar file that can be imported into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook. It does not automatically update if Lee Schools revises the calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Lee County school calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Use the printable PDF link on this page to open the official Lee County instructional calendar source. MySchoolDates also links back to the district calendar page for verification.

yearNumbers.label: Severe Weather Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: June 1-4 are reserved make-up windows and are only used if required after severe weather or other extended closures.

yearNumbers.label: Professional Duty Days
yearNumbers.detail: No-school professional duty days include October 19, January 4, March 29, and May 28.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break runs Monday through Thursday, followed by Good Friday.

whatsNew.title: Changes from the 2025-2026 Calendar
content: The first student day remains August 11.
Spring Break moves from March 16-20 in 2026 to March 22-25 in 2027.
The last student day moves from June 1 in 2026 to May 27 in 2027.
